market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill
articles.description: Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.

articles.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
articles.description: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

articles.title: New Hampshire council votes down $100M Bitcoin bonds
articles.description: State representative Keith Ammon said the New Hampshire executive council's vote against Bitcoin-backed bonds was “short-sighted,” urging the body to reconsider the measure.

articles.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
articles.description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

articles.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
articles.description: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

articles.title: Backpack joins race for 24/7 stock markets with tokenized equities
articles.description: The launch comes as tokenized stocks become one of the fastest-growing corners of crypto, with exchanges and traditional finance firms racing to expand 24/7 trading.

articles.title: U.S. government digital dollar set to be banned tonight under housing law's CBDC limit
articles.description: Despite President Donald Trump's refusal to sign Congress' bipartisan housing bill, it's set to go into effect at midnight, and its temporary CBDC ban along with it.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: How stablecoins found their niche
articles.description: Stablecoins are carving out specialized roles as regulation reshapes the market, while Strategy’s Bitcoin sale and Vanguard’s tokenization push highlight crypto’s evolving financial landscape.

articles.title: Hyundai becomes first major South Korean company to introduce internal stablecoin transfers
articles.description: The initiative builds on a broader shift by companies exploring stablecoins to move money between international operations more efficiently.

articles.title: Oratomic raises $300M to build a viable quantum computer that needs only 20K qubits
articles.description: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

articles.title: Bitcoin whales sent BTC price to $64K as Coinbase Premium broke key level: CryptoQuant
articles.description: Bitcoin price gains came thanks to US whales propeling the Coinbase Premium above a key trend line, new analysis from CryptoQuant reported.

articles.title: 史密森尼 VR 導覽帶你親眼見證，大霹靂誕生的瞬間與恆星之死
articles.description: 史密森尼學會（Smithsonian）於今年 5 月在華盛頓特區推出了一項名為「史密森尼 Starstruck […]

articles.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
articles.description: Amid signs of slowing engagement,  Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.

articles.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
articles.description: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.

articles.title: A16z’s Andreessen lands Federal Reserve role as AI reshapes policy debate
articles.description: The Fed named a16z co-founder Marc Andreessen to co-lead an AI productivity and jobs task force under Chair Kevin Warsh’s policy review.

articles.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
articles.description: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.

articles.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
articles.description: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. articles.title: MiCA licensing only the beginning as crypto custodians face scrutiny
articles.description: A MiCA license allows crypto firms to operate in the EU, but the ESMA’s review will test whether custodians can meet the required security and resilience standards.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Will the crypto lobby's $189M campaign get CLARITY over the line?
articles.description: As the CLARITY Act advances, crypto's growing political influence in Washington is under scrutiny. But the crypto lobby's massive campaign spend is only part of the story.
